## 📌 Description

Provide a brief summary of the changes introduced in this Pull Request.

Fixes #(issue number)

## 🧪 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature / learning track addition
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update (README, Contributing guide, docs)
- [ ] 🤖 New interview question(s) submission
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX polish or animation enhancement

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project.
- [ ] I have executed `python build.py` to update question indexes (if modifying `quiz.json`).
- [ ] I have executed `npm run build` and verified the bundle compiles cleanly.
- [ ] I have executed `npx playwright test` and verified all tests pass.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation where necessary.
